rows.label: qev040601_MSG0001
rows.name:
It's terrible-mo! We got a distress signal from
my Brother who went on his journey-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0002
rows.name:
It seems he's being chased by a weird monster
in the Primordial Wilderness
and is running around trying to escape-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0003
rows.name:
Please-mo!
Could you go help him right away-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0004
rows.name:
At this rate, before he finds the Sword of Legendaryness
and gets a full stomach, my Brother
will become monster food-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0006
rows.name: Thank you-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0007
rows.name:
If he uses the Infinigoggles Moimoi made,
he can spot monsters hiding in any darkness,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0008
rows.name:
and since my Brother is a master of running away,
I don't think he'll be eaten that easily, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0009
rows.name:
To all the starving folks out there,
Nopon apparently look like a feast-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev000406_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev000406_SEL0011
rows.name: Gaze hungrily and say he looks very delicious.

rows.label: qev000406_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev000406_SEL0021
rows.name: Say you wouldn't want to eat him.

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0010
rows.name:
Eek! Hii...!
I sensed a sinister presence-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0011
rows.name:
In that case, my Brother is
perfect bait for the monsters in the Primordial Wilderness-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0012
rows.name:
I don't know what will happen even to my Brother-mo.
I want you to go help him quickly-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0013
rows.name:
That's good... Lately, various aliens have been asking me
what I taste like, so I misunderstood-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0014
rows.name:
In that case, the monsters in the Primordial Wilderness
might give up right away too, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0015
rows.name:
Anyway, I want you to go help my Brother quickly-mo!
I'm counting on you-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0016
rows.name:
Right now, my Brother should be desperately running around
the Primordial Wilderness-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0017
rows.name:
Before my Brother gets eaten by a monster,
please do something to help him-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0018
rows.name: Brother, cheer up-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0019
rows.name:
Ugh... We're in the red-mo...
At this rate, Muimui and Moimoi will starve on the streets...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0020
rows.name:
Sorry-mo...
Sorry for being an unreliable Brother-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0021
rows.name:
It's okay, I'm sure you'll definitely be able to
get the Sword of Legendaryness next time-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0022
rows.name:
...Ah? You came back-mo?
Thank you for helping my Brother-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev000406_JNK0030
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev000406_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask about the Sword of Legendaryness.

rows.label: qev000406_JNK0040
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev000406_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask in detail why Muimui is depressed.

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0023
rows.name:
Well, it IS a legendary item, so the radar
did react to it, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0024
rows.name:
This... is a plaything that the children of
the legendary hero used to play with-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0025
rows.name:
Thinking this was the Sword of Legendaryness,
my Brother came back to NLA having all sorts of
delusions about living a life of luxury...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0026
rows.name:
But this... this is... a plaything that the children of
the legendary hero used to play with-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0027
rows.name:
It's a legendary toy sword-mo...
It's only worth about 250G-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0028
rows.name:
According to old literature, the real Sword of Legendaryness
has a strange pattern that appears on its handguard-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0029
rows.name:
I should have properly taught that
to my Brother-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0030
rows.name:
Even though I risked my life... beat the monsters...
and finally got it... Ugh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev000406_JNK0050
rows.name: Point Out

rows.label: qev000406_SEL0051
rows.name:
Point out that you were the one
who defeated the native creatures.

rows.label: qev000406_JNK0060
rows.name: Cheer

rows.label: qev000406_SEL0061
rows.name: Encourage the depressed Muimui.

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0031
rows.name:
...What are you talking about-mo?
Muimui doesn't really remember that part well-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0032
rows.name:
I can't bounce back from this easily-mo...
It was that huge of an adventure-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0033
rows.name: ...Anyway, thank you-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0034
rows.name:
My Brother's journey to seek the Sword of Legendaryness
will probably... continue-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040601_MSG0035
rows.name:
We want you to help us with various things again-mo.
Please-mo?[ST:wait ]
